note: Not part of the official 50-question ground-truth key (ground_truth_50.json). These five synthesized compliant cases exist solely to give scoring.py a negative class for the precision/recall curve on deviation detection -- see data/fixtures/benchmark_corpus/control_pass_cases.md for the source text and provenance disclosure.

questions.question: Generator prime power specification requires not less than 1500 kVA at 0.8 lagging PF. Caterpillar submittal states 1600 kVA at 0.8 lagging PF. Compliant?
Busway specification requires continuous current rating not less than 4000A. Submittal states 4500A. Compliant?
UPS input THDi specification requires not more than 5% at full load. Test report states 3.2% at full load. Compliant?
Transformer impedance specification requires not less than 5.5%. Test certificate states 6.0%. Compliant?
CRAC sensible cooling capacity specification requires not less than 120 kW per unit. Submittal states 125 kW. Compliant?
